name: Ask Concentration Contra (Final Frontier)
hypothesis: An even more extreme z-score for ask_depth_concentration (a massive ask wall) will have an even stronger (contra) predictive power for a price drop. This final, extreme push of the threshold from 7.5 to 9.0 aims to definitively map the performance peak, even if it reduces trade count.
mutation_note: Per feedback and improver-agent suggestion, applying one last extreme threshold tightening from 7.5 to 9.0 to confirm the performance peak has been passed.
